languages.text: "К чему стеречь оружие от своих? Раз смерть уже на пороге, не лучше ли сыграть партию в регицид?"

traits.locale_text: "К чему стеречь оружие от своих? Раз смерть уже на пороге, не лучше ли сыграть партию в регицид?"

languages.text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"
languages.original_text: "К чему стеречь оружие от своих? Раз смерть уже на пороге, не лучше ли сыграть партию в регицид?"

traits.locale_text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"
"What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"
"What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"

languages.text: “你们还守着这把武器做什么？都快死到临头了，不如来局弑君棋消磨一下时间？”
languages.original_text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"

traits.locale_text: “你们还守着这把武器做什么？都快死到临头了，不如来局弑君棋消磨一下时间？”

languages.text: « N'est-ce pas du gâchis de garder une arme qui serait plus utile entre les mains d'un de vos hommes ? Puisque la mort est à nos portes, je vous propose plutôt une partie de régicide. »
languages.original_text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"

traits.locale_text: « N'est-ce pas du gâchis de garder une arme qui serait plus utile entre les mains d'un de vos hommes ? Puisque la mort est à nos portes, je vous propose plutôt une partie de régicide. »

languages.text: "Silahları kendinizden saklamanın ne anlamı var? Madem ölüm kapımızda, neden bir el kral katili oynamıyoruz?"
languages.original_text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"

traits.locale_text: "Silahları kendinizden saklamanın ne anlamı var? Madem ölüm kapımızda, neden bir el kral katili oynamıyoruz?"

languages.text: «¿Qué sentido tiene proteger armas de tu propio bando? Ya que tenemos la muerte a las puertas, ¿por qué no echamos una partida de regicidio?».
languages.original_text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué sentido tiene proteger armas de tu propio bando? Ya que tenemos la muerte a las puertas, ¿por qué no echamos una partida de regicidio?».

languages.text: "Welchen Sinn hat es, Waffen vor Euren Leuten zurückzuhalten? Wie wäre es mit einer Partie Königsmord, nun, da der Tod vor unserer Tür steht?"
languages.original_text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"

traits.locale_text: "Welchen Sinn hat es, Waffen vor Euren Leuten zurückzuhalten? Wie wäre es mit einer Partie Königsmord, nun, da der Tod vor unserer Tür steht?"

languages.text: 「自らの国に武器を置かないのは何の意味があるのか。死が目前に迫っているのだから、王殺しをしようではないか」
languages.original_text: "What's the sense in keeping weapons from your own? Since death is at our doorstep, why not play a game of regicide?"

traits.locale_text: 「自らの国に武器を置かないのは何の意味があるのか。死が目前に迫っているのだから、王殺しをしようではないか」
